## Summary
Brief description of the change.

## Type of change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Docs / config only

## Checklist
- [ ] Commits follow [conventional commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) (e.g. `feat(api): add endpoint`)
- [ ] Tests added/updated
- [ ] Docs updated if needed
- [ ] Lint passes (`make lint` / `ruff check`)

Fixes #
